_comment: Calibration profile for Solo-cards-digital.pdf. All spatial values are in PDF POINTS (1/72 inch). See README.md 'Calibrating a new deck' for the full tuning workflow. Values below were seeded from measurements of the actual PDF (front cards are edge-to-edge, back cards sit inset with real gaps) -- confirm with --preview before trusting them.
_back_comment: The back page uses a DIFFERENT grid than the fronts: back cards are inset in their cell with a visible margin instead of being edge-to-edge. These back_* fields override the front grid only for back_page (row 0, col 0 is the only card actually exported). Delete them if your deck's back page shares the front grid exactly.
